metadata.title:
NOTHING LEFT


BUT SHADOW

LABOR SPEAKER SAYS RE-
PUBLIC WILL COME TO
THAT IN 10 YEARS UNLESS
CHANGE Is EFFECTED.

"This republic, within the next

seth, president of the California

last night addressed crowd of
ebout 100 in the high school audi

against the laboring man then he
is against human liberty.


"All we want Is the same chance
that the law gives to murderer
the right to be indicted and tried

decide--nothing but the judge who

against the laborers.

turn to despotic form of gov.
eminent. We are not attacking the
judiciary. but judge is only hui
man. Because he wears the
ermine robe is no reason that his
whole nature is changed. He il
subject to passions like the rest
of us.
